tasks.title: Build full PII/PHI scanner, reduction, migration, and retention platform
tasks.description: Turn ScanMeNow from a Phileas-derived redaction library into a full data governance engine for discovering, reducing, migrating, and retaining sensitive data. Parent epic for all Phase 1-7 subtasks.

tasks.title: Group B - HIPAA Safe Harbor & Presidio Analysis
tasks.description: Gap analysis of 18 HIPAA Safe Harbor identifiers against Presidio built-ins, identify missing detectors, design detection approach (32 subtasks)
tasks.plan:
## Overview

Extend the Presidio detection core to cover all 18 HIPAA Safe Harbor identifiers. Gap analysis confirms 10 are natively covered by Presidio; 7 need custom PatternRecognizer implementations (MRN, health plan beneficiary, account number, certificate/license, vehicle identifier, device identifier, biometric). Full-face photo detection is out of scope for text scanning.

## Phases

1. Gap Analysis & Coverage Matrix — audit Presidio built-ins, produce docs/hipaa_coverage.json
2. Custom Recognizer Sub-Package — 7 PatternRecognizer modules with unit tests (TDD)
3. AnalyzerEngine Integration — register ALL_RECOGNIZERS, multi-entity integration test

## First Proof Unit

Task 1.1: docs/hipaa_coverage.json exists with 18 entries.
Verify: uv run python -c "import json, pathlib; d=json.loads(pathlib.Path('docs/hipaa_coverage.json').read_text()); assert len(d)==18"

proofUnits.title: Coverage matrix complete
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: docs/hipaa_coverage.json exists with exactly 18 entries, each documenting an identifier's coverage status, recognizer type, and confidence notes.
proofUnits.exactCommand: uv run python -c "import json, pathlib; d=json.loads(pathlib.Path('docs/hipaa_coverage.json').read_text()); assert len(d)==18, f'Expected 18, got {len(d)}'; print(f'OK - {len(d)} identifiers documented')"
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: FileNotFoundError - docs/hipaa_coverage.json does not exist yet.

proofUnits.title: Structured-format recognizers pass unit tests
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: MedicalRecordRecognizer, VehicleIdentifierRecognizer, and HealthPlanBeneficiaryRecognizer each detect matching sample text and return no findings on plainly unrelated text.
proofUnits.exactCommand: uv run pytest tests/test_hipaa_recognizers.py -k "mrn or vehicle or beneficiary" -v
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: ModuleNotFoundError or test file does not exist.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: 6 passed - positive and negative test for each of the 3 recognizers.

proofUnits.title: Context-anchored recognizers pass unit tests
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: AccountNumberRecognizer, CertificateLicenseRecognizer, DeviceIdentifierRecognizer, and BiometricIdentifierRecognizer each detect matching sample text and return no findings on plainly unrelated text.
proofUnits.exactCommand: uv run pytest tests/test_hipaa_recognizers.py -k "account or license or device or biometric" -v
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: ModuleNotFoundError - recognizer modules do not exist yet.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: 8 passed - positive and negative test for each of the 4 recognizers.

proofUnits.title: AnalyzerEngine multi-entity integration
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: AnalyzerEngine with ALL_RECOGNIZERS registered detects at least 5 distinct entity types in a single multi-entity PHI sample text.
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: ImportError or assertion failure - custom recognizers not yet registered in AnalyzerEngine.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: 1 passed - findings contain >= 5 distinct entity_type values.

objective.statement: Extend the Presidio-based detection core to cover all 18 HIPAA Safe Harbor identifiers by implementing 7 custom PatternRecognizer modules and integrating them into the AnalyzerEngine, verified by a complete test suite and a documented coverage matrix.
successCriteria: docs/hipaa_coverage.json documents all 18 Safe Harbor identifiers with status, recognizer_type, and confidence_notes
Custom PatternRecognizer implementations exist for all 7 missing identifiers and pass positive unit tests
Negative unit tests verify no false matches on plainly unrelated text for each custom recognizer
AnalyzerEngine registers all 7 custom recognizers and detects them alongside native Presidio entities
Multi-entity integration test detects >= 5 distinct entity types from a single sample text
nonGoals: Filesystem scanning or file walker integration (Task #5)
Full-face photograph detection (not applicable to text scanning)

proofMap.criterion: docs/hipaa_coverage.json documents all 18 Safe Harbor identifiers with status, recognizer_type, and confidence_notes
Custom PatternRecognizer implementations exist for all 7 missing identifiers and pass positive unit tests
Negative unit tests verify no false matches on plainly unrelated text for each custom recognizer
AnalyzerEngine registers all 7 custom recognizers and detects them alongside native Presidio entities
Multi-entity integration test detects >= 5 distinct entity types from a single sample text

tasks.title: Group C - Synthetic PHI Corpus & Golden Findings
tasks.description: Build synthetic PHI test corpus covering all 18 identifiers with golden findings JSON for validation and accuracy benchmarking (22 subtasks)

tasks.title: Group D - Filesystem Walker & Integration
tasks.description: Local filesystem walker with path resolution, skip patterns, symlink policy, max-depth limits, and end-to-end CLI integration (21 subtasks)

tasks.title: Group E - Cloud & Retention Services
tasks.description: Firestore connection layer with environment flag for local dev, retention policy evaluation, and cloud integration (4 subtasks)

tasks.title: Group F - Phase 1 Exit Gate & Verification
tasks.description: Accuracy threshold validation, CLI functional tests on real fixture directory, documentation, and Phase 1 completion (1 subtask)
